release_notes: Self-update path no longer freezes the launcher. spawning the updater .ps1 was followed by app.quit(), which triggered a before-quit handler that awaited tracker.killAll() — up to ~16s per running profile (12s graceful + 4s force). The launcher window said "Не отвечает" the entire time, the user thought the update was stuck. Chrome bundles live outside the launcher install dir, so the launcher update has no reason to wait for Chrome to exit — orphan chrome.exe is handled by reconcileOrphans() on the next launch (added in 0.3.92 / fixed in 0.3.93). Now the update path uses app.exit(0), which skips before-quit and lets the .ps1 take over immediately.
